About Me

The person behind the systems

Class Bachelor's Psychology Degree
"There is something deeply satisfying about watching a system you built run on its own."

I am a Psychology graduate, a certified Associate, Chartered Institute of Personnel Management (ACIPM) Human Resource professional, and Operations & Systems professional. I work at the intersection of people, process, and technology; building operational systems that make businesses run cleaner and give the people I support their time back.

I lock in independently. No external push needed. I have delivered full client-ready work under real constraints including an entire internship run on a phone. What drives me is not just completing the tasks, but building something that works after I step away. Remote-first, internationally ready, and genuinely interested in making your operations excellent.

Remote-First Systems Thinker Automation Operations Psychology-Trained Adaptable
What I Do

How I support your business

⚙️

Business Operations & Systems

I build the infrastructure that keeps your business running. SOPs, workflow automation, database setup, process documentation, and operational roadmaps; built to work without constant oversight.

NotionAirtable ZapierMake ClickUpGoogle Workspace

Executive & Calendar Support

Calendar management, scheduling logic, meeting coordination, travel planning, and follow-up systems. Your time is protected. Nothing falls through the cracks.

Google CalendarCalendly SlackMicrosoft Outlook LoomZoom

Content & Communication Systems

Email sequences, content pipelines, social media automation, and audience communication. I build systems that speak for your brand consistently, even when you are not in the room.

Operations Portfolio

Work Modules

Each module below is a real operational system I built. Not mockups. Not descriptions. Actual working outputs with screenshots and live links.

Built a multi-trigger automation system for HeartImprint, covering Instagram comment-to-DM automation (ManyChat), a workshop booking confirmation workflow (Zapier: Google Forms → Gmail draft → Google Sheets), and WhatsApp business communication flows. Each system was designed to run without manual intervention after setup.

Live Evidence

Real-World Application

Any business running workshops, events, or lead magnets can use this setup to eliminate manual follow-up, capture data automatically, and respond to enquiries instantly.

Reusability Value

The Zapier zap and ManyChat flow are template-ready. They can be adapted to any Google Form intake process or Instagram lead capture campaign in under an hour.

Built Zoë Botanica Wellness end-to-end as a luxury wellness brand on Brevo. Delivered a 5-email psychological trust-building sequence (welcome, reintroduction, education, soft sell, final conversion), a 10-product Canva catalogue, a Google Form checkout simulation, and a complete Notion brand workspace. Every email was written with deliberate psychology: building trust before asking for action.

Live Evidence

View Notion Workspace →

Real-World Application

Any product or service business launching a new offer or building an email list can use this framework; brand setup, audience nurture sequence, and catalogue production, all ready to deploy.

Reusability Value

The 5-email sequence structure is adaptable to any brand. The psychological progression (trust → education → consideration → conversion) works across industries.

Co-built TaskBridge, a WhatsApp-first micro-jobs platform, from the ground up. Delivered a full internal operations system: a multi-table Airtable base (Clients, Workers, Payments, Tasks), a business operations manual, an investor pitch deck, Google Forms intake system, and a 90-day executive roadmap in Notion. This was a full business infrastructure build, not a task list.

Live Evidence

View Operations Workspace → View 90-Day Roadmap →

Real-World Application

Any startup or SME needing to go from idea to operational infrastructure can use this model. Database, manual, intake system, and growth roadmap delivered as a complete package.

Reusability Value

The Airtable base structure and operations manual template are adaptable to any service-based platform matching supply to demand. The 90-day roadmap format works for any early-stage operation.

Designed a complete executive calendar and automation system for a C-suite profile. Built scheduling rules and availability logic in Calendly, synced to Google Calendar, with automation triggers in Zapier and Make handling booking confirmations, prep reminders, and follow-up sequences automatically. The entire system was documented in a Notion workspace with SOPs for handover.

View Executive Operations Workspace →

Real-World Application

Any executive or senior team member whose calendar is a daily operations challenge. This system removes scheduling as a bottleneck, automates follow-through, and keeps the executive focused on high-value work.

Reusability Value

The Calendly configuration, Zapier zap structure, and Notion SOP template can be replicated for any executive or client-facing professional in under a day.
